title: sigpending Function Workflow
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of checking for pending signals that are currently blocked from delivery using the sigpending function.
relationships: A process blocks signals using sigprocmask
An external event or process generates a signal for the target process
Because the signal is blocked, it is marked as pending
The process calls sigpending() to retrieve the set of signals pending delivery
The return value from sigpending() is the set of pending signals
The process logic examines which specific signals are pending
The process may later unblock the signal(s) to allow delivery and handling
